---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Install template with `dotnet new install ...`
2. Create solution with `dotnet new my-web -n ...`
3. Run `dotnet build` / `dotnet test` / etc.
4. See error

## Expected behavior
A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04]
- .NET SDK version: [run `dotnet --version`]
- Visual Studio version (if applicable): [e.g. VS 2022 17.12]
- Template version: [commit hash or release tag]

## Generated code (if applicable)
If the bug is in generated code, include relevant snippets from the `Generated/` folder or output from source generators.

## Additional context
Add any other context about the problem here.
